titleStmt.title: SII 23.114: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 114. (A.R. No. 114 of 1907.) Kalliḍaikkuṟichchi, Ambasamudram Taluk, Tirunelveli District Vināyaka temple—on the south wall of the central shrine

summary.p: This is dated in the 15+1st year of a king whose name is not however specified. It records the communication of the royal order by the mahāsabhā of Rājarāja-chaturvēdimaṅgalam to the Śivabrāhmaṇas of the Puravuvari Vighna-Vināyaka temple, confirming the exemption of taxes on the land at Madiṭkuṟichchi (s.a. Kalliḍaikkuṟichchi), which had already been in its enjoyment for some time. The order permits the demarcation of the boundaries named by means of stones and the engraving of the deed on stone and copper.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . rājarājacaturvedimaṅkalattu mahāsabhaiyom Olai teṉ piṭākai kallaṭaikkuṟicci
yil piḷḷaiyār puravuvarivighnaviṉāyakar koyilil śivabrāhmaṇaṉ kaṇṭu Ippiḷḷaiyāṟku muṉpu Ūrākak kuṭuttu I
ppiḷḷaiyār vari niṅkalāka Aṉubhavittu varukiṟa nilam matiṭkuṟicciyil nilattukku perunāṉkellaiyāvatu kiḻellai śrī
mādhavavāykkālukku meṟkum teṉṉellai Ippiḷḷaiyār koyilile niṉṟu śrī mādhavavāykkālukkup pokiṟa pilā
ṟṟil vaṭacuvarukku vaṭakkum melellai kiraittoṭṭattiṟ kiḻ cuvarukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭavellai Āḷumpirāṉ[ bhaṭ] ṭar toṭ
ṭavayakkalāk Aṉubhavittuvarukiṟa nilattiṉ teṉvarampukkut teṟkum Āka Innāṉkellaikkuṭpaṭṭa nilam muṉpu dāṉamuṭai
yanāy Aṉubhavittuvarukiṟa paṭiyile yāṇṭu 10 5- vati ṉetirāmāṇṭu puraṭṭāti māsattile Innā
ṉkellaiyilumn tiruccūlakkallu nāṭṭi Inniyokappaṭiyile In nilam Amutupaṭi cāttuppaṭi Uḷ
ḷiṭṭu veṇṭumni tta nimantaṅkaḷukku variniṅkalāka kalliluñ cempilum veṭṭikkoḷka Ivai vala
vūr śrīraṅganāthar Eḻuttu Ivai yivvūr tevavati Umaiperumāḷeḻuttu Ivai piṟāntūr śrīmādhavan Eḻut
tu Ivai Ātaṉūr tiruvāykkulatevaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai periṅkūr piḷḷaiāḻvāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai korovi Āḷavantāṉ bha Iṭaik kāṭaṉ kumāravā
maṉaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai Iṭaittuṟai comāciy Eḻuttu Ivai koṟut talai perāyiramuṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai IḷaivimaṅkalattuStops incomplete.
Digital edition of SII 23.114 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
